sections.short-biography: Helped in Xian’s escape from Li Jue but killed one of the attendants to Empress Fu.

full_text:
Sun Hui
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Hui. Helped in Xian’s escape from Li Jue but killed one of the attendants to Empress Fu. Sun Hui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
